rows.label: qev060611_MSG0001
rows.name:
You... were watching my argument with Orleron
from the sidelines, weren't you? You probably
think I'm a terrible woman, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060611_SEL0011
rows.name:
Point out that she was
speaking too harshly.

rows.label: qev060611_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her she is not a terrible person.

rows.label: qev060611_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hmph, think whatever you want.
A dense guy like him won't
understand unless I say that much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060611_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Please don't say that. I'm a
terrible person who hurt his feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060611_MSG0004
rows.name:
But, a dense guy like him won't
understand unless I say that much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060611_MSG0005
rows.name:
What does he mean by "favorable"...
I'm going to live my life freely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060611_MSG0006
rows.name:
I don't want to be tied down and
overthinking things for a guy like that![ST:wait ]
